fastag: FASTag is an RFID-based toll collection system in India.
toll system: A toll system processes vehicle entries and completes payment transactions.
spring boot: Spring Boot is a Java framework for building microservices.
nlp: NLP stands for Natural Language Processing.
embedding: Embeddings convert text into numerical vectors for similarity search.
rag: RAG improves LLM accuracy by providing retrieved context.
mongodb: MongoDB is a NoSQL document database.
postgresql: PostgreSQL is a powerful relational database.
redis: Redis is an in-memory key-value store used for caching.
hadoop: Hadoop is a distributed big-data processing framework.
spark: Apache Spark is used for fast distributed computing.
aws: AWS provides cloud computing services and infrastructure.
docker: Docker packages applications in lightweight containers.
python: Python is a high-level programming language for AI and automation.
java: Java is a platform-independent object-oriented language.
hello: Hello! How can I help you today?
